item.title: ‘How Apple Became Apple: The Definitive Oral History of the Company’s Earliest Days’ 摘要
item.description:
This article discusses a Fast Company feature by Harry McCracken that provides an oral history of Apple's early days, highlighting the company's origins and renegade spirit. It includes an anecdote about Steve Jobs recruiting 14-year-old Chris Espinosa from a computer store to test BASIC for the Apple II, illustrating Apple's unconventional beginnings. The piece contrasts this early energy with the more restrained Tim Cook era, noting Apple's best moments come from that original innovative and rebellious ethos.
标签: Apple, history, Steve Jobs, oral history, technology, business, innovation, culture, computing, entrepreneurship
